'''hasholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scallywag|scallywag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scallywag|scallywag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hasholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsheleth|hæsheleth]] || [[word:hæshelej|hæshelej]] || [[word:hæshelesh|hæshelesh]] || [[word:hæshele|hæshele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hashosholoth|hashosholoth]] || [[word:hashosholoj|hashosholoj]] || [[word:hashosholosh|hashosholosh]] || [[word:hashosholo|hashosholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasholoth|hasholoth]] || [[word:hasholoj|hasholoj]] || [[word:hasholosh|hasholosh]] || [[word:hasholo|hasholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hashofloth|hashofloth]] || [[word:hashofloj|hashofloj]] || [[word:hashoflosh|hashoflosh]] || [[word:hashoflof|hashoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasholotho|hasholotho]] || [[word:hasholojo|hasholojo]] || [[word:hasholosho|hasholosho]] || [[word:hasholoko|hasholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasholoth|hasholoth]] || [[word:hasholoj|hasholoj]] || [[word:hasholosh|hasholosh]] || [[word:hasholo|hasholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasholothol|hasholothol]] || [[word:hasholojol|hasholojol]] || [[word:hasholoshol|hasholoshol]] || [[word:hasholokol|hasholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasholothotho|hasholothotho]] || [[word:hasholojojo|hasholojojo]] || [[word:hasholoshosho|hasholoshosho]] || [[word:hasholoko|hasholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasholothon|hasholothon]] || [[word:hasholojon|hasholojon]] || [[word:hasholoshon|hasholoshon]] || [[word:hasholokon|hasholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasholothoro|hasholothoro]] || [[word:hasholojoro|hasholojoro]] || [[word:hasholoshoro|hasholoshoro]] || [[word:hasholokoro|hasholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
